top_signals.title: Epstein victims blast Trump attorney general nominee Todd Blanche after meeting
top_signals.summary: "Todd Blanche treated the meeting as a mere 'check-the-box' exercise intended to secure votes for his confirmation," said Epstein survivor Dani Bensky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
